title: Paphiopedilum liemianum
taxonomy: Paphiopedilum liemianum is a species of orchid in the genus Paphiopedilum. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which includes approximately 30,000 species of orchids. Paphiopedilum liemianum is further classified into the subfamily Cypripedioideae, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. Within the subfamily, Paphiopedilum liemianum is part of the tribe Cypripedieae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.

intro: Paphiopedilum liemianum, also known as the Liem's Venus slipper, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Sumatra, Indonesia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing stress and improving overall well-being.
